name: bring-back-spawner-blocking
title: Bring Back Spawner Blocking
author: BeraIV
description: Reverts the 2.1 spawner changes that broke walling off nests, and adds a Mining-Patch-Planner-style selection tool, with a shortcut bar button and ALT+S keybind: drag it over spawners to drop a sparse grid of pipe ghosts out to spawning_radius. Placements are tied to your undo queue (ctrl+z undoes a whole drag at once), and anything in the way of a pipe ghost gets marked for deconstruction so the ghost goes down anyway, like a forced blueprint paste.
